form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at Bendigo over 425m in 23.57 last start, beating Flaming Smooth. Likes the rails so back in top order and looks the one to beat.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Collided on the first turn, stumbled, lost ground and fell.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split but had to contend with second when clocking 21.94 over 390m at this track. Rates among the chances this time.

form.formComment: Caught the eye with a fast early split and setting up a 2.25 lengths win at Ballarat over 390m in 21.92. Looks the one to beat again.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by one length over 390m at this track in a handy (22.13), beating Cinnabar Icon. Will find this a bit tougher, prepared to risk.

form.formComment: Good performance to win by 0.9 lengths at Healesville over 300m (16.60) beating Talk Is Cheap in Free For All on November 9. Strong form emerging from the last run. Looks one of the chances.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but the start prior recorded a handy 22.21 over 390m finishing second at this track. Prefer others this time.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (19.41) at Healesville in a Grade 5, finishing fourth and beaten 2.5 lengths. Has performed well off the draw with a win and five places from 10 starts. Makes appeal on best.
